title: Tape Stop
description: Prevents anything from rendering as you leave!
body:
# Tape Stop At your wish! **Tape Stop** prevents the game from rendering as you leave, which may result in a much better performance when you left the game window alone. You can configure various things through the **Mod Menu.** Generously, **Tape Stop** provides 2 ways to decorate your window when the game stopped rendering.
  1. Render a rotating grass block with random background color.
  2. Rendering the panorama.
